type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 17% increase in kiln production time

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 17% increase in kiln production time + For process emissions, several fine tuning changes were made to get more consistent with the methodologies used in other Graymont plants. The major change is the use of AP42 13.2.4 eq 1 instead of AP42 11.19.2 for operations using truck loading.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Carbon monoxide was below reporting treshold in 2016. Emission factor (EF) was updated from 1,344 kg /10E6 m3 (1.3 kg/h) to 13.3 kg/h. This first EF was from literature, the updated EF is from 2017 kiln stack report.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was no LKD landfilled in 2013, while there was 887 tons landfilled in 2016, which explains why Cadmium is reported in 2016

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was no LKD landfilled in 2013, while there was 887 tons landfilled in 2016, which explains why Lead is reported in 2016

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Lead is found in Lime Kiln Dust, which is landfilled periodically. In 2013, there was no LKD landfilled, therefore lead was not reported.  In 2016, 887 tons of LKD was landfilled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Reduction of time of operation of the kiln (-15%), and proportionnal reduction in natural gas usage (-21%)
